sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Everything you need to know about domain registration at Cloud Host.

items.question: How long does it take for a domain to become active?
items.answer: Most domain registrations are instant. However, global propagation of DNS settings can take anywhere from a few minutes to 24-48 hours.

items.question: Can I transfer my existing domain to Cloud Host?
items.answer: Yes. Our automated transfer tool makes it simple. Unlock your domain at your current registrar and get an EPP authorization code.

items.question: Is WHOIS privacy protection really free?
items.answer: Absolutely. We believe your privacy shouldn't be a paid feature. We hide your personal information from the public WHOIS database at no extra cost.

items.question: Do you offer discounts for bulk registration?
items.answer: Yes, we have a specialized reseller and bulk program for users managing more than 50 domains. Contact our sales team for custom pricing.
